study_name: IBDMDB / iHMP IBD Multi-omics

publication_title: Multi-omics of the gut microbial ecosystem in inflammatory bowel diseases
omics_layer: Multi-omics; Bulk transcriptomics; Metagenomics; Metatranscriptomics; Metabolomics; Metaproteomics; Virome
